items.description: - หลังคาเหล็กรีดลอน หนา 0.4 มม. พร้อมติดตั้ง PE.FOAM หนารวม 6 มม.
- ครอบหลังคา FLASHING
- เชิงชายไฟเบอร์ซีเมนต์ ขนาด 8" หนา 12 มม.
รวมข้อ 2.1 งานหลังคา

warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; this is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg to read), the lower-numbered sheet (5/19) paired with sheet 6/19 extracted as _2.json.

Only 3 material rows exist under 2.1 งานหลังคา on this sheet (roof sheeting, flashing, fascia board) - checked carefully for a hidden 4th row between the fascia line and the total row; none present, all remaining rows to the bottom of the table are genuinely blank.
Printed page number (doc_page) not legibly visible at the scan corners - left null rather than guessed.

doc_page (38) was not directly legible on this sheet's own corner crop, but is inferred with high confidence from a confirmed linear relationship: page 38's cover sheet had a clearly legible doc_page=36 and page 47's final sheet had a clearly legible doc_page=45 (both full 2-digit numbers, independently re-verified via zoomed crops) - a consistent offset of png_page - 2 across all 10 pages in this 38-47 batch.
Independent re-read (t4, 2026-07-08 schema round) matches t3's transcription exactly (115, 43, 43). No disagreement found. Only wrapper-level addition vs t3 is the new mandatory source_image field.
